summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. The deployed HTTPS origin https://draft.choir-ip.com/ successfully serves the guest auth UI with all expected elements. No console errors on initial load. This is a smoke test only - full passkey ceremony testing requires Playwright with virtual authenticator.
